title: Scope of Salvo/Spot Inspection. The Department shall undertake
content: 50 inspection in response to a complaint or report of illegal recruitment activities, human 51 trafficking activities and/or recruitment violations. Such inspection shall be conducted in 52 accordance with relevant laws, rules and regulations. 53 54 55 Licensing of Philippine Overseas Shipping Enterprise 56 57
